nodes.label: Davao Central College Logo
nodes.description: Official institutional logo/seal of Davao Central College, featuring a gear border with torch emblem, flame symbol labeled 'LIGHT', and motto 'LIVE LOVE'. Established 1948, located in Toril, Davao City.
nodes.symbolism: Educational institution identity combining industrial (gear), enlightenment (torch/flame), and foundational values (live, love)

nodes.label: Davao Central College
nodes.description: Educational institution established in 1948, located in Toril, Davao City

nodes.label: Educational Symbolism
nodes.description: Visual symbolism in educational branding: torch represents knowledge/enlightenment, flame represents passion/learning, gear represents industry/progress

nodes.label: Davao Central College Learning Resource Center Logo
nodes.description: Circular institutional logo with green background and gold border. Features stylized books icon in center. Text reads 'DAVAO CENTRAL COLLEGE' at top and 'LEARNING RESOURCE CENTER' at bottom in gold letters.
nodes.design_elements: circular badge, book stack icon, green and gold color scheme, institutional branding
nodes.purpose: institutional identity, library branding, learning resource center visual identity
nodes.norm_label: davao central college learning resource center logo

nodes.description: 3D rendered icon depicting spreadsheet export functionality, featuring XLS and CSV text labels above a grid/table representation in green and white colors
